tEn: Hierarchical Graph Representation Learning with Differentiable Pooling
tZh: 基于可微分池化的层次化图表示学习
sEn: DiffPool learns hierarchical graph representations via differentiable soft clustering, boosting GNN accuracy by 5-10%.
sZh: DiffPool通过可微分软聚类学习层次化图表示，将GNN准确率提升5-10%。
absEn: Recently, graph neural networks (GNNs) have revolutionized the field of graph representation learning through effectively learned node embeddings, and achieved state-of-the-art results in tasks such as node classification and link prediction. However, current GNN methods are inherently flat and do not learn hierarchical representations of graphs---a limitation that is especially problematic for the task of graph classification, where the goal is to predict the label associated with an entire graph. Here we propose DiffPool, a differentiable graph pooling module that can generate hierarchical representations of graphs and can be combined with various graph neural network architectures in an end-to-end fashion. DiffPool learns a differentiable soft cluster assignment for nodes at each layer of a deep GNN, mapping nodes to a set of clusters, which then form the coarsened input for the next GNN layer. Our experimental results show that combining existing GNN methods with DiffPool yields an average improvement of 5-10% accuracy on graph classification benchmarks, compared to all existing pooling approaches, achieving a new state-of-the-art on four out of five benchmark data sets.
absZh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）通过有效学习节点嵌入，彻底改变了图表示学习领域，并在节点分类和链接预测等任务中取得了最先进的成果。然而，当前的GNN方法本质上是平坦的，无法学习图的层次化表示——这一局限性对于图分类任务（即预测整个图的标签）尤其成问题。本文提出了DiffPool，一种可微分的图池化模块，能够生成图的层次化表示，并以端到端的方式与各种图神经网络架构结合。DiffPool在深度GNN的每一层学习一个可微分的软聚类分配，将节点映射到一组聚类中，这些聚类随后形成下一GNN层的粗化输入。我们的实验结果表明，与所有现有的池化方法相比，将现有GNN方法与DiffPool结合，在图分类基准测试上平均提高了5-10%的准确率，在五个基准数据集中有四个达到了新的最先进水平。

contrib.en: Proposes DiffPool, a differentiable graph pooling module for hierarchical graph representation learning.
contrib.zh: 提出DiffPool，一种用于层次化图表示学习的可微图池化模块。

contrib.en: Enables end-to-end training of deep GNNs with hierarchical pooling, improving graph classification accuracy by 5-10%.
contrib.zh: 实现带层次池化的深度GNN端到端训练，将图分类准确率提升5-10%。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on four out of five benchmark graph classification datasets.
contrib.zh: 在五个基准图分类数据集中的四个上达到最先进结果。

contrib.en: Learns interpretable hierarchical clusters corresponding to community structures in graphs.
contrib.zh: 学习与图中社区结构对应的可解释层次化聚类。

contrib.en: Demonstrates permutation invariance of the pooling operation, ensuring robustness to node ordering.
contrib.zh: 证明池化操作的置换不变性，确保对节点排序的鲁棒性。

contrib.en: Introduces auxiliary link prediction and entropy regularization to improve training stability and cluster quality.
contrib.zh: 引入辅助链接预测和熵正则化以提高训练稳定性和聚类质量。

limits.en: Requires predefining the maximum number of clusters per layer, which may not be optimal for all graphs.
limits.zh: 需要预定义每层的最大聚类数，可能并非对所有图最优。

limits.en: Soft cluster assignments may lead to noisy coarsened graphs and increased computational cost.
limits.zh: 软聚类分配可能导致粗化图噪声增加和计算成本上升。

limits.en: Performance depends on the base GNN architecture; not all GNNs benefit equally from DiffPool.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于基础GNN架构；并非所有GNN都能从DiffPool中同等受益。

limits.en: Auxiliary objectives (link prediction, entropy) add training complexity and may require careful tuning.
limits.zh: 辅助目标（链接预测、熵）增加训练复杂度，可能需要仔细调参。

limits.en: Struggles with graphs containing many structurally similar nodes, potentially pooling distant nodes together.
limits.zh: 在包含许多结构相似节点的图上表现不佳，可能将远距离节点池化在一起。

items.en: Recently, graph neural networks (GNNs) have revolutionized the field of graph representation learning through effectively learned node embeddings, and achieved state-of-the-art results in tasks such as node classification and link prediction. However, current GNN methods are inherently flat and do not learn hierarchical representations of graphs—a limitation that is especially problematic for the task of graph classification, where the goal is to predict the label associated with an entire graph. Here we propose DiffPool, a differentiable graph pooling module that can generate hierarchical representations of graphs and can be combined with various graph neural network architectures in an end-to-end fashion. DiffPool learns a differentiable soft cluster assignment for nodes at each layer of a deep GNN, mapping nodes to a set of clusters, which then form the coarsened input for the next GNN layer. Our experimental results show that combining existing GNN methods with DiffPool yields an average improvement of 555–10%percent1010\% accuracy on graph classification benchmarks, compared to all existing pooling approaches, achieving a new state-of-the-art on four out of five benchmark data sets.
items.zh: 近年来，图神经网络（GNN）通过有效学习节点嵌入，彻底改变了图表示学习领域，并在节点分类和链接预测等任务中取得了最先进的结果。然而，当前的GNN方法本质上是平坦的，无法学习图的层次化表示——这一限制对于图分类任务尤其成问题，因为该任务的目标是预测整个图对应的标签。在此，我们提出DiffPool，一种可微分的图池化模块，能够生成图的层次化表示，并能以端到端的方式与各种图神经网络架构结合。DiffPool在深层GNN的每一层学习一个可微分的软聚类分配，将节点映射到一组聚类，这些聚类随后形成下一层GNN的粗化输入。我们的实验结果表明，将现有GNN方法与DiffPool结合，在图分类基准测试上相比所有现有池化方法平均提高了5%–10%的准确率，在五个基准数据集中有四个达到了新的最先进水平。

items.en: In recent years there has been a surge of interest in developing graph neural networks (GNNs)—general deep learning architectures that can operate over graph structured data, such as social network data [16, 22, 37] or graph-based representations of molecules [7, 11, 15]. The general approach with GNNs is to view the underlying graph as a computation graph and learn neural network primitives that generate individual node embeddings by passing, transforming, and aggregating node feature information across the graph [15, 16]. The generated node embeddings can then be used as input to any differentiable prediction layer, e.g., for node classification [16] or link prediction [33], and the whole model can be trained in an end-to-end fashion.
items.zh: 近年来，人们对开发图神经网络（GNN）——一种能够在图结构数据（如社交网络数据[16, 22, 37]或分子的图表示[7, 11, 15]）上运行的通用深度学习架构——产生了浓厚的兴趣。GNN的一般方法是将底层图视为计算图，并通过在图[15, 16]上传递、变换和聚合节点特征信息来学习生成单个节点嵌入的神经网络原语。生成的节点嵌入随后可用作任何可微分预测层的输入，例如用于节点分类[16]或链接预测[33]，并且整个模型可以以端到端的方式进行训练。

items.en: However, a major limitation of current GNN architectures is that they are inherently flat as they only propagate information across the edges of the graph and are unable to infer and aggregate the information in a hierarchical way. For example, in order to successfully encode the graph structure of organic molecules, one would ideally want to encode the local molecular structure (e.g., individual atoms and their direct bonds) as well as the coarse-grained structure of the molecular graph (e.g., groups of atoms and bonds representing functional units in a molecule). This lack of hierarchical structure is especially problematic for the task of graph classification, where the goal is to predict the label associated with an entire graph. When applying GNNs to graph classification, the standard approach is to generate embeddings for all the nodes in the graph and then to globally pool all these node embeddings together, e.g., using a simple summation or neural network that operates over sets [7, 11, 15, 26]. This global pooling approach ignores any hierarchical structure that might be present in the graph, and it prevents researchers from building effective GNN models for predictive tasks over entire graphs.
items.zh: 然而，当前GNN架构的一个主要限制是它们本质上是平坦的，因为它们仅在图边上传播信息，无法以层次化的方式推断和聚合信息。例如，为了成功编码有机分子的图结构，理想情况下需要编码局部分子结构（例如，单个原子及其直接键）以及分子图的粗粒度结构（例如，代表分子中功能单元的原子和键组）。这种层次化结构的缺失对于图分类任务尤其成问题，因为该任务的目标是预测整个图对应的标签。当将GNN应用于图分类时，标准方法是为图中的所有节点生成嵌入，然后全局池化所有这些节点嵌入，例如使用简单的求和或对集合操作的神经网络[7, 11, 15, 26]。这种全局池化方法忽略了图中可能存在的任何层次化结构，并阻碍了研究人员为整个图上的预测任务构建有效的GNN模型。

items.en: Here we propose DiffPool, a differentiable graph pooling module that can be adapted to various graph neural network architectures in an hierarchical and end-to-end fashion (Figure 1). DiffPool allows for developing deeper GNN models that can learn to operate on hierarchical representations of a graph. We develop a graph analogue of the spatial pooling operation in CNNs [24], which allows for deep CNN architectures to iteratively operate on coarser and coarser representations of an image. The challenge in the GNN setting—compared to standard CNNs—is that graphs contain no natural notion of spatial locality, i.e., one cannot simply pool together all nodes in a “m×m𝑚𝑚m\times m patch” on a graph, because the complex topological structure of graphs precludes any straightforward, deterministic definition of a “patch”. Moreover, unlike image data, graph data sets often contain graphs with varying numbers of nodes and edges, which makes defining a general graph pooling operator even more challenging.
items.zh: 在此，我们提出DiffPool，一种可微分的图池化模块，能够以层次化和端到端的方式适应各种图神经网络架构（图1）。DiffPool允许开发更深的GNN模型，这些模型可以学习对图的层次化表示进行操作。我们开发了CNN中空间池化操作[24]的图类比，这使得深层CNN架构能够迭代地对越来越粗的图像表示进行操作。与标准CNN相比，GNN设置中的挑战在于图不包含自然的空间局部性概念，即不能简单地将图中“m×m块”中的所有节点池化在一起，因为图的复杂拓扑结构排除了任何直接、确定性的“块”定义。此外，与图像数据不同，图数据集通常包含具有不同节点和边数量的图，这使得定义通用的图池化算子更具挑战性。

items.en: In order to solve the above challenges, we require a model that learns how to cluster together nodes to build a hierarchical multi-layer scaffold on top of the underlying graph. Our approach DiffPool learns a differentiable soft assignment at each layer of a deep GNN, mapping nodes to a set of clusters based on their learned embeddings. In this framework, we generate deep GNNs by “stacking” GNN layers in a hierarchical fashion (Figure 1): the input nodes at the layer l𝑙l GNN module correspond to the clusters learned at the layer l−1𝑙1l-1 GNN module. Thus, each layer of DiffPool coarsens the input graph more and more, and DiffPool is able to generate a hierarchical representation of any input graph after training. We show that DiffPool can be combined with various GNN approaches, resulting in an average 7% gain in accuracy and a new state of the art on four out of five benchmark graph classification tasks. Finally, we show that DiffPool can learn interpretable hierarchical clusters that correspond to well-defined communities in the input graphs.
items.zh: 为了解决上述挑战，我们需要一个模型来学习如何将节点聚类在一起，以在底层图上构建层次化的多层支架。我们的方法DiffPool在深层GNN的每一层学习一个可微分的软分配，根据学习到的嵌入将节点映射到一组聚类。在此框架中，我们通过以层次化方式“堆叠”GNN层来生成深层GNN（图1）：第l层GNN模块的输入节点对应于第l-1层GNN模块学习到的聚类。因此，DiffPool的每一层都使输入图越来越粗化，并且DiffPool能够在训练后生成任何输入图的层次化表示。我们展示了DiffPool可以与各种GNN方法结合，平均准确率提升7%，并在五个基准图分类任务中的四个上达到了新的最先进水平。最后，我们展示了DiffPool可以学习可解释的层次化聚类，这些聚类对应于输入图中定义良好的社区。

items.capEn: Figure 1: High-level illustration of our proposed method DiffPool. At each hierarchical layer, we run a GNN model to obtain embeddings of nodes. We then use these learned embeddings to cluster nodes together and run another GNN layer on this coarsened graph. This whole process is repeated for L𝐿L layers and we use the final output representation to classify the graph.
items.capZh: 图1：我们提出的方法DiffPool的高层示意图。在每个层次层，我们运行一个GNN模型以获得节点的嵌入。然后，我们使用这些学习到的嵌入将节点聚类在一起，并在该粗化图上运行另一个GNN层。整个过程重复L层，我们使用最终的输出表示来对图进行分类。

items.en: Our work builds upon a rich line of recent research on graph neural networks and graph classification.
items.zh: 我们的工作建立在最近关于图神经网络和图分类的丰富研究基础上。

items.en: General graph neural networks. A wide variety of graph neural network (GNN) models have been proposed in recent years, including methods inspired by convolutional neural networks [5, 8, 11, 16, 22, 25, 30, 37], recurrent neural networks [26], recursive neural networks [1, 31] and loopy belief propagation [7]. Most of these approaches fit within the framework of “neural message passing” proposed by Gilmer et al. [15]. In the message passing framework, a GNN is viewed as a message passing algorithm where node representations are iteratively computed from the features of their neighbor nodes using a differentiable aggregation function. Hamilton et al. [17] provides a conceptual review of recent advancements in this area, and Bronstein et al. [4] outlines connections to spectral graph convolutions.
items.zh: 通用图神经网络。近年来，提出了多种图神经网络（GNN）模型，包括受卷积神经网络[5, 8, 11, 16, 22, 25, 30, 37]、循环神经网络[26]、递归神经网络[1, 31]和循环置信传播[7]启发的方法。这些方法大多符合Gilmer等人[15]提出的“神经消息传递”框架。在消息传递框架中，GNN被视为一种消息传递算法，其中节点表示通过可微分的聚合函数从邻居节点的特征迭代计算得出。Hamilton等人[17]对该领域的最新进展进行了概念性回顾，Bronstein等人[4]则概述了与谱图卷积的联系。

items.en: Graph classification with graph neural networks. GNNs have been applied to a wide variety of tasks, including node classification [16, 22], link prediction [32], graph classification [7, 11, 41], and chemoinformatics [29, 28, 14, 19, 33]. In the context of graph classification—the task that we study here—a major challenge in applying GNNs is going from node embeddings, which are the output of GNNs, to a representation of the entire graph. Common approaches to this problem include simply summing up or averaging all the node embeddings in a final layer [11], introducing a “virtual node” that is connected to all the nodes in the graph [26], or aggregating the node embeddings using a deep learning architecture that operates over sets [15]. However, all of these methods have the limitation that they do not learn hierarchical representations (i.e., all the node embeddings are globally pooled together in a single layer), and thus are unable to capture the natural structures of many real-world graphs. Some recent approaches have also proposed applying CNN architectures to the concatenation of all the node embeddings [30, 41], but this requires a specifying (or learning) a canonical ordering over nodes, which is in general very difficult and equivalent to solving graph isomorphism.
items.zh: 基于图神经网络的图分类。GNN已应用于多种任务，包括节点分类[16, 22]、链接预测[32]、图分类[7, 11, 41]和化学信息学[29, 28, 14, 19, 33]。在图分类的背景下——我们在此研究的任务——应用GNN的一个主要挑战是如何从GNN输出的节点嵌入过渡到整个图的表示。解决此问题的常见方法包括简单地对最后一层中的所有节点嵌入求和或取平均[11]，引入一个与图中所有节点相连的“虚拟节点”[26]，或使用对集合操作的深度学习架构聚合节点嵌入[15]。然而，所有这些方法都有局限性，即它们不学习层次化表示（即所有节点嵌入在单层中全局池化），因此无法捕捉许多现实世界图的自然结构。最近的一些方法还提出将CNN架构应用于所有节点嵌入的拼接[30, 41]，但这需要指定（或学习）节点上的规范顺序，这通常非常困难，相当于解决图同构问题。

items.en: Lastly, there are some recent works that learn hierarchical graph representations by combining GNNs with deterministic graph clustering algorithms [8, 36, 13], following a two-stage approach. However, unlike these previous approaches, we seek to learn the hierarchical structure in an end-to-end fashion, rather than relying on a deterministic graph clustering subroutine.
items.zh: 最后，最近有一些工作通过将GNN与确定性图聚类算法[8, 36, 13]结合，采用两阶段方法来学习层次化图表示。然而，与这些先前方法不同，我们寻求以端到端的方式学习层次化结构，而不是依赖于确定性的图聚类子程序。

items.en: The key idea of DiffPool is that it enables the construction of deep, multi-layer GNN models by providing a differentiable module to hierarchically pool graph nodes. In this section, we outline the DiffPool module and show how it is applied in a deep GNN architecture.
items.zh: DiffPool的关键思想是，它通过提供一个可微分的模块来层次化地池化图节点，从而能够构建深层、多层的GNN模型。在本节中，我们概述DiffPool模块，并展示它如何在深层GNN架构中应用。

items.en: We represent a graph G𝐺G as (A,F)𝐴𝐹(A,F), where A∈{0,1}n×n𝐴superscript01𝑛𝑛A\in\{0,1\}^{n\times n} is the adjacency matrix, and F∈ℝn×d𝐹superscriptℝ𝑛𝑑F\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d} is the node feature matrix assuming each node has d𝑑d features.111We do not consider edge features, although one can easily extend the algorithm to support edge features using techniques introduced in [36]. Given a set of labeled graphs 𝒟={(G1,y1),(G2,y2),…}𝒟subscript𝐺1subscript𝑦1subscript𝐺2subscript𝑦2…\mathcal{D}=\{(G_{1},y_{1}),(G_{2},y_{2}),...\} where yi∈𝒴subscript𝑦𝑖𝒴y_{i}\in\mathcal{Y} is the label corresponding to graph Gi∈𝒢subscript𝐺𝑖𝒢G_{i}\in\mathcal{G}, the goal of graph classification is to learn a mapping f:𝒢→𝒴:𝑓→𝒢𝒴f:\mathcal{G}\to\mathcal{Y} that maps graphs to the set of labels. The challenge—compared to standard supervised machine learning setup—is that we need a way to extract useful feature vectors from these input graphs. That is, in order to apply standard machine learning methods for classification, e.g., neural networks, we need a procedure to convert each graph to an finite dimensional vector in ℝDsuperscriptℝ𝐷\mathbb{R}^{D}.

items.zh: 其中Ã = A + I，D̃ = ∑_j Ã_ij，W^(k)∈ℝ^(d×d)是可训练的权重矩阵。我们提出的可微分池化模型可以应用于任何实现方程(1)的GNN模型，并且与M的具体实现方式无关。

items.en: A full GNN module will run K𝐾K iterations of Equation (1) to generate the final output node embeddings Z=H(K)∈ℝn×d𝑍superscript𝐻𝐾superscriptℝ𝑛𝑑Z=H^{(K)}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}, where K𝐾K is usually in the range 2-6. For simplicity, in the following sections we will abstract away the internal structure of the GNNs and use Z=GNN​(A,X)𝑍GNN𝐴𝑋Z=\textrm{GNN}(A,X) to denote an arbitrary GNN module implementing K𝐾K iterations of message passing according to some adjacency matrix A𝐴A and initial input node features X𝑋X.
items.zh: 一个完整的GNN模块将运行方程(1)的K次迭代，以生成最终的输出节点嵌入Z = H^(K)∈ℝ^(n×d)，其中K通常在2-6范围内。为简单起见，在以下各节中，我们将抽象GNN的内部结构，并使用Z = GNN(A, X)来表示任意一个GNN模块，该模块根据某个邻接矩阵A和初始输入节点特征X实现K次消息传递迭代。

items.en: Stacking GNNs and pooling layers. GNNs implementing Equation (1) are inherently flat, as they only propagate information across edges of a graph. The goal of this work is to define a general, end-to-end differentiable strategy that allows one to stack multiple GNN modules in a hierarchical fashion. Formally, given Z=GNN​(A,X)𝑍GNN𝐴𝑋Z=\textrm{GNN}(A,X), the output of a GNN module, and a graph adjacency matrix A∈ℝn×n𝐴superscriptℝ𝑛𝑛A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times n}, we seek to define a strategy to output a new coarsened graph containing m<n𝑚𝑛m<n nodes, with weighted adjacency matrix A′∈ℝm×msuperscript𝐴′superscriptℝ𝑚𝑚A^{{}^{\prime}}\in\mathbb{R}^{m\times m} and node embeddings Z′∈ℝm×dsuperscript𝑍′superscriptℝ𝑚𝑑Z^{{}^{\prime}}\in\mathbb{R}^{m\times d}. This new coarsened graph can then be used as input to another GNN layer, and this whole process can be repeated L𝐿L times, generating a model with L𝐿L GNN layers that operate on a series of coarser and coarser versions of the input graph (Figure 1). Thus, our goal is to learn how to cluster or pool together nodes using the output of a GNN, so that we can use this coarsened graph as input to another GNN layer. What makes designing such a pooling layer for GNNs especially challenging—compared to the usual graph coarsening task—is that our goal is not to simply cluster the nodes in one graph, but to provide a general recipe to hierarchically pool nodes across a broad set of input graphs. That is, we need our model to learn a pooling strategy that will generalize across graphs with different nodes, edges, and that can adapt to the various graph structures during inference.
items.zh: 堆叠GNN和池化层。实现方程(1)的GNN本质上是平坦的，因为它们仅在图边上传播信息。本工作的目标是定义一种通用的、端到端可微分的策略，允许以层次化方式堆叠多个GNN模块。形式上，给定Z = GNN(A, X)（GNN模块的输出）和图邻接矩阵A∈ℝ^(n×n)，我们寻求定义一种策略，输出一个新的包含m < n个节点的粗化图，具有加权邻接矩阵A'∈ℝ^(m×m)和节点嵌入Z'∈ℝ^(m×d)。这个新的粗化图随后可用作另一个GNN层的输入，并且整个过程可以重复L次，生成一个具有L个GNN层的模型，这些层对输入图的一系列越来越粗的版本进行操作（图1）。因此，我们的目标是学习如何使用GNN的输出将节点聚类或池化在一起，以便我们可以将此粗化图用作另一个GNN层的输入。与通常的图粗化任务相比，为GNN设计这样的池化层特别具有挑战性，因为我们的目标不仅仅是聚类一个图中的节点，而是提供一种通用方法来层次化地池化一组广泛的输入图中的节点。也就是说，我们的模型需要学习一种池化策略，该策略能够泛化到具有不同节点和边的图，并在推理过程中适应各种图结构。

full.secZh: 3.2 基于学习分配的可微池化

items.en: Our proposed approach, DiffPool, addresses the above challenges by learning a cluster assignment matrix over the nodes using the output of a GNN model. The key intuition is that we stack L𝐿L GNN modules and learn to assign nodes to clusters at layer l𝑙l in an end-to-end fashion, using embeddings generated from a GNN at layer l−1𝑙1l-1. Thus, we are using GNNs to both extract node embeddings that are useful for graph classification, as well to extract node embeddings that are useful for hierarchical pooling. Using this construction, the GNNs in DiffPool learn to encode a general pooling strategy that is useful for a large set of training graphs. We first describe how the DiffPool module pools nodes at each layer given an assignment matrix; following this, we discuss how we generate the assignment matrix using a GNN architecture.
items.zh: 我们提出的方法DiffPool通过使用GNN模型的输出学习节点上的聚类分配矩阵来解决上述挑战。关键直觉是，我们堆叠L个GNN模块，并使用从第l-1层GNN生成的嵌入，以端到端的方式学习在第l层将节点分配到聚类。因此，我们使用GNN来提取对图分类有用的节点嵌入，以及提取对层次化池化有用的节点嵌入。通过这种构造，DiffPool中的GNN学习编码一种通用的池化策略，该策略对大量训练图有用。我们首先描述DiffPool模块在给定分配矩阵的情况下如何在每一层池化节点；随后，我们讨论如何使用GNN架构生成分配矩阵。

items.en: Pooling with an assignment matrix. We denote the learned cluster assignment matrix at layer l𝑙l as S(l)∈ℝnl×nl+1superscript𝑆𝑙superscriptℝsubscript𝑛𝑙subscript𝑛𝑙1S^{(l)}\in\mathbb{R}^{n_{l}\times n_{l+1}}. Each row of S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)} corresponds to one of the nlsubscript𝑛𝑙n_{l} nodes (or clusters) at layer l𝑙l, and each column of S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)} corresponds to one of the nl+1subscript𝑛𝑙1n_{l+1} clusters at the next layer l+1𝑙1l+1. Intuitively, S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)} provides a soft assignment of each node at layer l𝑙l to a cluster in the next coarsened layer l+1𝑙1l+1.
items.zh: 使用分配矩阵进行池化。我们将第l层学习到的聚类分配矩阵记为S^(l)∈ℝ^(n_l × n_(l+1))。S^(l)的每一行对应于第l层的一个节点（或聚类），S^(l)的每一列对应于下一层l+1的一个聚类。直观上，S^(l)提供了第l层每个节点到下一个粗化层l+1中一个聚类的软分配。

items.en: Suppose that S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)} has already been computed, i.e., that we have computed the assignment matrix at the l𝑙l-th layer of our model. We denote the input adjacency matrix at this layer as A(l)superscript𝐴𝑙A^{(l)} and denote the input node embedding matrix at this layer as Z(l)superscript𝑍𝑙Z^{(l)}. Given these inputs, the DiffPool layer (A(l+1),X(l+1))=DiffPool​(A(l),Z(l))superscript𝐴𝑙1superscript𝑋𝑙1DiffPoolsuperscript𝐴𝑙superscript𝑍𝑙(A^{(l+1)},X^{(l+1)})=\textsc{DiffPool}(A^{(l)},Z^{(l)}) coarsens the input graph, generating a new coarsened adjacency matrix A(l+1)superscript𝐴𝑙1A^{(l+1)} and a new matrix of embeddings X(l+1)superscript𝑋𝑙1X^{(l+1)} for each of the nodes/clusters in this coarsened graph. In particular, we apply the two following equations:
items.zh: 假设我们已经计算了 S^{(l)}，即我们已经计算了模型第 l 层的分配矩阵。我们将该层的输入邻接矩阵记为 A^{(l)}，并将该层的输入节点嵌入矩阵记为 Z^{(l)}。给定这些输入，DiffPool 层 (A^{(l+1)}, X^{(l+1)}) = \textsc{DiffPool}(A^{(l)}, Z^{(l)}) 对输入图进行粗化，生成一个新的粗化邻接矩阵 A^{(l+1)} 和该粗化图中每个节点/簇的新嵌入矩阵 X^{(l+1)}。具体地，我们应用以下两个方程：

items.en: Equation (3) takes the node embeddings Z(l)superscript𝑍𝑙Z^{(l)} and aggregates these embeddings according to the cluster assignments S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)}, generating embeddings for each of the nl+1subscript𝑛𝑙1n_{l+1} clusters. Similarly, Equation (4) takes the adjacency matrix A(l)superscript𝐴𝑙A^{(l)} and generates a coarsened adjacency matrix denoting the connectivity strength between each pair of clusters.
items.zh: 方程 (3) 取节点嵌入 Z^{(l)}，并根据簇分配 S^{(l)} 聚合这些嵌入，为每个 n_{l+1} 个簇生成嵌入。类似地，方程 (4) 取邻接矩阵 A^{(l)} 并生成一个粗化邻接矩阵，表示每对簇之间的连接强度。

items.en: Through Equations (3) and (4), the DiffPool layer coarsens the graph: the next layer adjacency matrix A(l+1)superscript𝐴𝑙1A^{(l+1)} represents a coarsened graph with nl+1subscript𝑛𝑙1n_{l+1} nodes or cluster nodes, where each individual cluster node in the new coarsened graph corresponds to a cluster of nodes in the graph at layer l𝑙l. Note that A(l+1)superscript𝐴𝑙1A^{(l+1)} is a real matrix and represents a fully connected edge-weighted graph; each entry Ai​j(l+1)subscriptsuperscript𝐴𝑙1𝑖𝑗A^{(l+1)}_{ij} can be viewed as the connectivity strength between cluster i𝑖i and cluster j𝑗j. Similarly, the i𝑖i-th row of X(l+1)superscript𝑋𝑙1X^{(l+1)} corresponds to the embedding of cluster i𝑖i. Together, the coarsened adjacency matrix A(l+1)superscript𝐴𝑙1A^{(l+1)} and cluster embeddings X(l+1)superscript𝑋𝑙1X^{(l+1)} can be used as input to another GNN layer, a process which we describe in detail below.
items.zh: 通过方程 (3) 和 (4)，DiffPool 层对图进行粗化：下一层的邻接矩阵 A^{(l+1)} 表示一个具有 n_{l+1} 个节点或簇节点的粗化图，其中新粗化图中的每个簇节点对应于第 l 层图中节点的一个簇。注意，A^{(l+1)} 是一个实数矩阵，表示一个全连接边加权图；每个条目 A^{(l+1)}_{ij} 可视为簇 i 和簇 j 之间的连接强度。类似地，X^{(l+1)} 的第 i 行对应于簇 i 的嵌入。粗化邻接矩阵 A^{(l+1)} 和簇嵌入 X^{(l+1)} 可以一起用作另一个 GNN 层的输入，我们将在下面详细描述这一过程。

items.en: Learning the assignment matrix. In the following we describe the architecture of DiffPool, i.e., how DiffPool generates the assignment matrix S(l)superscript𝑆𝑙S^{(l)} and embedding matrices Z(l)superscript𝑍𝑙Z^{(l)} that are used in Equations (3) and (4). We generate these two matrices using two separate GNNs that are both applied to the input cluster node features X(l)superscript𝑋𝑙X^{(l)} and coarsened adjacency matrix A(l)superscript𝐴𝑙A^{(l)}. The embedding GNN at layer l𝑙l is a standard GNN module applied to these inputs:
items.zh: 学习分配矩阵。下面我们描述 DiffPool 的架构，即 DiffPool 如何生成方程 (3) 和 (4) 中使用的分配矩阵 S^{(l)} 和嵌入矩阵 Z^{(l)}。我们使用两个独立的 GNN 生成这两个矩阵，这两个 GNN 都应用于输入簇节点特征 X^{(l)} 和粗化邻接矩阵 A^{(l)}。第 l 层的嵌入 GNN 是一个应用于这些输入的标准 GNN 模块：

items.en: i.e., we take the adjacency matrix between the cluster nodes at layer l𝑙l (from Equation 4) and the pooled features for the clusters (from Equation 3) and pass these matrices through a standard GNN to get new embeddings Z(l)superscript𝑍𝑙Z^{(l)} for the cluster nodes. In contrast, the pooling GNN at layer l𝑙l, uses the input cluster features X(l)superscript𝑋𝑙X^{(l)} and cluster adjacency matrix A(l)superscript𝐴𝑙A^{(l)} to generate an assignment matrix:
items.zh: 即，我们取第 l 层簇节点之间的邻接矩阵（来自方程 (4)）和簇的池化特征（来自方程 (3)），并将这些矩阵通过一个标准 GNN 以获得簇节点的新嵌入 Z^{(l)}。相比之下，第 l 层的池化 GNN 使用输入簇特征 X^{(l)} 和簇邻接矩阵 A^{(l)} 生成一个分配矩阵：

items.en: where the softmax function is applied in a row-wise fashion. The output dimension of GNNl,poolsubscriptGNN𝑙pool\textrm{GNN}_{l,\text{pool}} corresponds to a pre-defined maximum number of clusters in layer l𝑙l, and is a hyperparameter of the model.
items.zh: 其中 softmax 函数按行应用。GNN_{l,\text{pool}} 的输出维度对应于第 l 层预定义的最大簇数，并且是模型的一个超参数。

items.en: Note that these two GNNs consume the same input data but have distinct parameterizations and play separate roles: The embedding GNN generates new embeddings for the input nodes at this layer, while the pooling GNN generates a probabilistic assignment of the input nodes to nl+1subscript𝑛𝑙1n_{l+1} clusters.
items.zh: 注意，这两个 GNN 消耗相同的输入数据，但具有不同的参数化并扮演不同的角色：嵌入 GNN 为该层的输入节点生成新嵌入，而池化 GNN 生成输入节点到 n_{l+1} 个簇的概率分配。

items.en: In the base case, the inputs to Equations (5) and Equations (6) at layer l=0𝑙0l=0 are simply the input adjacency matrix A𝐴A and the node features F𝐹F for the original graph. At the penultimate layer L−1𝐿1L-1 of a deep GNN model using DiffPool, we set the assignment matrix S(L−1)superscript𝑆𝐿1S^{(L-1)} be a vector of 111’s, i.e., all nodes at the final layer L𝐿L are assigned to a single cluster, generating a final embedding vector corresponding to the entire graph. This final output embedding can then be used as feature input to a differentiable classifier (e.g., a softmax layer), and the entire system can be trained end-to-end using stochastic gradient descent.
items.zh: 在基本情况下，第 l=0 层方程 (5) 和方程 (6) 的输入就是原始图的输入邻接矩阵 A 和节点特征 F。在使用 DiffPool 的深度 GNN 模型的倒数第二层 L-1，我们将分配矩阵 S^{(L-1)} 设置为全 1 向量，即最终层 L 的所有节点被分配到一个簇，生成对应于整个图的最终嵌入向量。该最终输出嵌入可以用作可微分分类器（例如 softmax 层）的特征输入，并且整个系统可以使用随机梯度下降进行端到端训练。

items.en: Permutation invariance. Note that in order to be useful for graph classification, the pooling layer should be invariant under node permutations. For DiffPool we get the following positive result, which shows that any deep GNN model based on DiffPool is permutation invariant, as long as the component GNNs are permutation invariant.
items.zh: 置换不变性。注意，为了对图分类有用，池化层应在节点置换下保持不变。对于 DiffPool，我们得到以下正面结果，表明任何基于 DiffPool 的深度 GNN 模型都是置换不变的，只要组件 GNN 是置换不变的。

items.en: Let P∈{0,1}n×n𝑃superscript01𝑛𝑛P\in\{0,1\}^{n\times n} be any permutation matrix, then DiffPool​(A,Z)=DiffPool​(P​A​PT,P​X)DiffPool𝐴𝑍DiffPool𝑃𝐴superscript𝑃𝑇𝑃𝑋\text{\sc{DiffPool}}(A,Z)=\text{\sc{DiffPool}}(PAP^{T},PX) as long as GNN​(A,X)=GNN​(P​A​PT,X)GNN𝐴𝑋GNN𝑃𝐴superscript𝑃𝑇𝑋\textrm{GNN}(A,X)=\textrm{GNN}(PAP^{T},X) (i.e., as long as the GNN method used is permutation invariant).
items.zh: 设 P ∈ {0,1}^{n×n} 为任意置换矩阵，则 DiffPool(A, Z) = DiffPool(PAP^T, PX)，只要 GNN(A, X) = GNN(PAP^T, X)（即只要使用的 GNN 方法是置换不变的）。

items.en: Equations (5) and (6) are permutation invariant by the assumption that the GNN module is permutation invariant. And since any permutation matrix is orthogonal, applying PT​P=Isuperscript𝑃𝑇𝑃𝐼P^{T}P=I to Equation (3) and (4) finishes the proof. ∎
items.zh: 方程 (5) 和 (6) 是置换不变的，因为假设 GNN 模块是置换不变的。并且由于任何置换矩阵都是正交的，将 P^T P = I 应用于方程 (3) 和 (4) 完成证明。∎

full.sec: 3.3 Auxiliary Link Prediction Objective and Entropy Regularization
full.secZh: 3.3 辅助链接预测目标与熵正则化

items.en: In practice, it can be difficult to train the pooling GNN (Equation 4) using only gradient signal from the graph classification task. Intuitively, we have a non-convex optimization problem and it can be difficult to push the pooling GNN away from spurious local minima early in training. To alleviate this issue, we train the pooling GNN with an auxiliary link prediction objective, which encodes the intuition that nearby nodes should be pooled together. In particular, at each layer l𝑙l, we minimize LLP=||A(l),S(l)S(l)T||FL_{\text{LP}}=||A^{(l)},S^{(l)}S^{{(l)}^{T}}||_{F}, where ||⋅||F||\cdot||_{F} denotes the Frobenius norm. Note that the adjacency matrix A(l)superscript𝐴𝑙A^{(l)} at deeper layers is a function of lower level assignment matrices, and changes during training.
items.zh: 在实践中，仅使用来自图分类任务的梯度信号训练池化 GNN（方程 (4)）可能很困难。直观上，我们有一个非凸优化问题，并且在训练早期很难将池化 GNN 从虚假局部最小值中推开。为了缓解这个问题，我们使用辅助链接预测目标训练池化 GNN，该目标编码了相邻节点应被池化在一起的直觉。具体地，在每一层 l，我们最小化 L_{LP} = ||A^{(l)}, S^{(l)}S^{(l)^T}||_F，其中 ||·||_F 表示 Frobenius 范数。注意，更深层的邻接矩阵 A^{(l)} 是较低层分配矩阵的函数，并在训练过程中变化。

items.en: Another important characteristic of the pooling GNN (Equation 4) is that the output cluster assignment for each node should generally be close to a one-hot vector, so that the membership for each cluster or subgraph is clearly defined. We therefore regularize the entropy of the cluster assignment by minimizing LE=1n​∑i=1nH​(Si)subscript𝐿E1𝑛superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛𝐻subscript𝑆𝑖L_{\text{E}}=\frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^{n}H(S_{i}), where H𝐻H denotes the entropy function, and Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i} is the i𝑖i-th row of S𝑆S.
items.zh: 池化 GNN（方程 (4)）的另一个重要特征是每个节点的输出簇分配通常应接近 one-hot 向量，以便每个簇或子图的成员关系明确定义。因此，我们通过最小化 L_E = (1/n) ∑_{i=1}^n H(S_i) 来正则化簇分配的熵，其中 H 表示熵函数，S_i 是 S 的第 i 行。

items.en: During training, LLPsubscript𝐿LPL_{\text{LP}} and LEsubscript𝐿EL_{\text{E}} from each layer are added to the classification loss. In practice we observe that training with the side objective takes longer to converge, but nevertheless achieves better performance and more interpretable cluster assignments.
items.zh: 在训练期间，来自每一层的 L_{LP} 和 L_E 被添加到分类损失中。在实践中，我们观察到使用辅助目标训练需要更长的收敛时间，但能实现更好的性能和更可解释的簇分配。

items.en: We evaluate the benefits of DiffPool against a number of state-of-the-art graph classification approaches, with the goal of answering the following questions:
items.zh: 我们评估 DiffPool 相对于多种最先进的图分类方法的优势，旨在回答以下问题：

items.en: How does DiffPool compare to other pooling methods proposed for GNNs (e.g., using sort pooling [41] or the Set2Set method [15])?
items.zh: DiffPool 与为 GNN 提出的其他池化方法（例如，使用排序池化 [41] 或 Set2Set 方法 [15]）相比如何？

items.en: How does DiffPool combined with GNNs compare to the state-of-the-art for graph classification task, including both GNNs and kernel-based methods?
items.zh: DiffPool 与 GNN 结合后，与图分类任务的最先进方法（包括 GNN 和基于核的方法）相比如何？

items.en: Does DiffPool compute meaningful and interpretable clusters on the input graphs?
items.zh: DiffPool 是否在输入图上计算有意义且可解释的簇？

items.en: Data sets. To probe the ability of DiffPool to learn complex hierarchical structures from graphs in different domains, we evaluate on a variety of relatively large graph data sets chosen from benchmarks commonly used in graph classification [20]. We use protein data sets including Enzymes, Proteins [3, 12], D&D [10], the social network data set Reddit-Multi-12k [40], and the scientific collaboration data set Collab [40]. See Appendix A for statistics and properties. For all these data sets, we perform 10-fold cross-validation to evaluate model performance, and report the accuracy averaged over 10 folds.
items.zh: 数据集。为了探究 DiffPool 从不同领域的图中学习复杂层次结构的能力，我们在图分类常用基准中选择的各种相对较大的图数据集上进行评估 [20]。我们使用蛋白质数据集，包括 Enzymes、Proteins [3, 12]、D&D [10]，社交网络数据集 Reddit-Multi-12k [40]，以及科学合作数据集 Collab [40]。统计信息和属性见附录 A。对于所有这些数据集，我们执行 10 折交叉验证以评估模型性能，并报告 10 折平均准确率。

items.en: Model configurations. In our experiments, the GNN model used for DiffPool is built on top of the GraphSage architecture, as we found this architecture to have superior performance compared to the standard GCN approach as introduced in [22]. We use the “mean” variant of GraphSage [16] and apply a DiffPool layer after every two GraphSage layers in our architecture. A total of 2 DiffPool layers are used for the datasets. For small datasets such as Enzymes and Collab, 1 DiffPool layer can achieve similar performance. After each DiffPool layer, 3 layers of graph convolutions are performed, before the next DiffPool layer, or the readout layer. The embedding matrix and the assignment matrix are computed by two separate GraphSage models respectively. In the 2 DiffPool layer architecture, the number of clusters is set as 25%percent2525\% of the number of nodes before applying DiffPool, while in the 1 DiffPool layer architecture, the number of clusters is set as 10%percent1010\%. Batch normalization [18] is applied after every layer of GraphSage. We also found that adding an ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} normalization to the node embeddings at each layer made the training more stable. In Section 1, we also test an analogous variant of DiffPool on the Structure2Vec [7] architecture, in order to demonstrate how DiffPool can be applied on top of other GNN models. All models are trained for 3 000 epochs with early stopping applied when the validation loss starts to drop. We also evaluate two simplified versions of DiffPool:
items.zh: 模型配置。在我们的实验中，用于 DiffPool 的 GNN 模型基于 GraphSage 架构构建，因为我们发现该架构比 [22] 中介绍的标准 GCN 方法具有更优的性能。我们使用 GraphSage [16] 的“均值”变体，并在架构中每两个 GraphSage 层后应用一个 DiffPool 层。对于这些数据集，总共使用 2 个 DiffPool 层。对于小型数据集如 Enzymes 和 Collab，1 个 DiffPool 层即可达到类似性能。在每个 DiffPool 层之后，执行 3 层图卷积，然后进入下一个 DiffPool 层或读出层。嵌入矩阵和分配矩阵分别由两个独立的 GraphSage 模型计算。在 2 个 DiffPool 层的架构中，簇数设置为应用 DiffPool 前节点数的 25%，而在 1 个 DiffPool 层的架构中，簇数设置为 10%。在每个 GraphSage 层之后应用批归一化 [18]。我们还发现，在每一层对节点嵌入添加 ℓ2 归一化使训练更稳定。在第 1 节中，我们还在 Structure2Vec [7] 架构上测试了 DiffPool 的类似变体，以展示 DiffPool 如何应用于其他 GNN 模型之上。所有模型训练 3 000 个 epoch，并在验证损失开始下降时应用早停。我们还评估了 DiffPool 的两个简化版本：

items.en: DiffPool-Det, is a DiffPool model where assignment matrices are generated using a deterministic graph clustering algorithm [9].
items.zh: DiffPool-Det 是一种 DiffPool 模型，其中分配矩阵使用确定性图聚类算法生成 [9]。

items.en: DiffPool-NoLP is a variant of DiffPool where the link prediction side objective is turned off.
items.zh: DiffPool-NoLP 是 DiffPool 的一种变体，其中关闭了链接预测辅助目标。

items.en: In the performance comparison on graph classification, we consider baselines based upon GNNs (combined with different pooling methods) as well as state-of-the-art kernel-based approaches.
items.zh: 在图分类的性能比较中，我们考虑了基于 GNN（结合不同池化方法）的基线方法以及最先进的基于核的方法。

items.en: GraphSage with global mean-pooling [16]. Other GNN variants such as those proposed in [22] are omitted as empirically GraphSAGE obtained higher performance in the task.
items.zh: GraphSage 使用全局均值池化 [16]。其他 GNN 变体，如 [22] 中提出的，由于经验上 GraphSAGE 在该任务中获得了更高的性能，因此被省略。

items.en: Structure2Vec (S2V) [7] is a state-of-the-art graph representation learning algorithm that combines a latent variable model with GNNs. It uses global mean pooling.
items.zh: Structure2Vec (S2V) [7] 是一种最先进的图表示学习算法，它将潜变量模型与 GNN 相结合。它使用全局均值池化。

items.en: Edge-conditioned filters in CNN for graphs (ECC) [36] incorporates edge information into the GCN model and performs pooling using a graph coarsening algorithm.
items.zh: 图 CNN 中的边条件滤波器 (ECC) [36] 将边信息纳入 GCN 模型，并使用图粗化算法进行池化。

items.en: PatchySan [30] defines a receptive field (neighborhood) for each node, and using a canonical node ordering, applies convolutions on linear sequences of node embeddings.
items.zh: PatchySan [30] 为每个节点定义一个感受野（邻域），并使用规范节点排序，对节点嵌入的线性序列应用卷积。

items.en: Set2Set replaces the global mean-pooling in the traditional GNN architectures by the aggregation used in Set2Set [39]. Set2Set aggregation has been shown to perform better than mean pooling in previous work [15]. We use GraphSage as the base GNN model.
items.zh: Set2Set 将传统 GNN 架构中的全局均值池化替换为 Set2Set [39] 中使用的聚合。Set2Set 聚合在先前工作中已被证明优于均值池化 [15]。我们使用 GraphSage 作为基础 GNN 模型。

items.en: SortPool [41] applies a GNN architecture and then performs a single layer of soft pooling followed by 1D convolution on sorted node embeddings.
items.zh: SortPool [41] 应用 GNN 架构，然后执行单层软池化，接着对排序后的节点嵌入进行一维卷积。

items.en: For all the GNN baselines, we use 10-fold cross validation numbers reported by the original authors when possible. For the GraphSage and Set2Set baselines, we use the base implementation and hyperparameter sweeps as in our DiffPool approach. When baseline approaches did not have the necessary published numbers, we contacted the original authors and used their code (if available) to run the model, performing a hyperparameter search based on the original author’s guidelines.
items.zh: 对于所有 GNN 基线，我们尽可能使用原始作者报告的 10 折交叉验证数值。对于 GraphSage 和 Set2Set 基线，我们使用与 DiffPool 方法相同的基础实现和超参数扫描。当基线方法没有必要的已发表数值时，我们联系了原始作者并使用他们的代码（如果可用）运行模型，根据原始作者的指南进行超参数搜索。

items.en: Kernel-based algorithms. We use the Graphlet [35], the Shortest-Path [2], Weisfeiler-Lehman kernel (WL) [34], and Weisfeiler-Lehman Optimal Assignment kernel (WL-OA) [23] as kernel baselines. For each kernel, we computed the normalized gram matrix. We computed the classification accuracies using the C𝐶C-SVM implementation of LibSvm [6], using 10-fold cross validation. The C𝐶C parameter was selected from {10−3,10−2,…,102,\{10^{-3},10^{-2},\dotsc,10^{2}, 103}10^{3}\} by 10-fold cross validation on the training folds. Moreover, for WL and WL-OA we additionally selected the number of iteration from {0,…,5}0…5\{0,\dots,5\}.
items.zh: 基于核的算法。我们使用 Graphlet [35]、最短路径 [2]、Weisfeiler-Lehman 核 (WL) [34] 和 Weisfeiler-Lehman 最优分配核 (WL-OA) [23] 作为核基线。对于每个核，我们计算了归一化的 Gram 矩阵。我们使用 LibSvm [6] 的 C-SVM 实现计算分类准确率，采用 10 折交叉验证。C 参数从 {10^{-3}, 10^{-2}, …, 10^{2}, 10^{3}} 中通过训练折上的 10 折交叉验证选择。此外，对于 WL 和 WL-OA，我们还从 {0, …, 5} 中选择迭代次数。

items.en: Differentiable Pooling on Structure2Vec. DiffPool can be applied to other GNN architectures besides GraphSage to capture hierarchical structure in the graph data. To further support answering Q1, we also applied DiffPool on Structure2Vec (S2V). We ran experiments using S2V with three layer architecture, as reported in [7]. In the first variant, one DiffPool layer is applied after the first layer of S2V, and two more S2V layers are stacked on top of the output of DiffPool. The second variant applies one DiffPool layer after the first and second layer of S2V respectively. In both variants, S2V model is used to compute the embedding matrix, while GraphSage model is used to compute the assignment matrix.
items.zh: Structure2Vec 上的可微池化。DiffPool 可以应用于除 GraphSage 之外的其他 GNN 架构，以捕获图数据中的层次结构。为了进一步支持回答 Q1，我们还将 DiffPool 应用于 Structure2Vec (S2V)。我们使用三层架构的 S2V 进行实验，如 [7] 中所述。在第一个变体中，在 S2V 的第一层之后应用一个 DiffPool 层，然后在 DiffPool 的输出之上堆叠两个 S2V 层。第二个变体分别在 S2V 的第一层和第二层之后应用一个 DiffPool 层。在两个变体中，S2V 模型用于计算嵌入矩阵，而 GraphSage 模型用于计算分配矩阵。

items.en: The results in terms of classification accuracy are summarized in Table 2. We observe that DiffPool significantly improves the performance of S2V on both Enzymes and D&D data sets. Similar performance trends are also observed on other data sets. The results demonstrate that DiffPool is a general strategy to pool over hierarchical structure that can benefit different GNN architectures.
items.zh: 分类准确率的结果总结在表 2 中。我们观察到 DiffPool 在 Enzymes 和 D&D 数据集上显著提高了 S2V 的性能。在其他数据集上也观察到类似的性能趋势。结果表明，DiffPool 是一种通用的池化策略，可以用于层次结构，并能使不同的 GNN 架构受益。

items.en: Running time. Although applying DiffPool requires additional computation of an assignment matrix, we observed that DiffPool did not incur substantial additional running time in practice. This is because each DiffPool layer reduces the size of graphs by extracting a coarser representation of the graph, which speeds up the graph convolution operation in the next layer. Concretely, we found that GraphSage with DiffPool was 12×\times faster than the GraphSage model with Set2Set pooling, while still achieving significantly higher accuracy on all benchmarks.
items.zh: 运行时间。尽管应用 DiffPool 需要额外计算分配矩阵，但我们观察到 DiffPool 在实践中并没有带来大量的额外运行时间。这是因为每个 DiffPool 层通过提取图的更粗表示来减小图的大小，从而加速下一层的图卷积操作。具体来说，我们发现带有 DiffPool 的 GraphSage 比带有 Set2Set 池化的 GraphSage 模型快 12 倍，同时在所有基准测试中仍然实现了显著更高的准确率。

full.sec: 4.3 Analysis of Cluster Assignment in DiffPool

items.en: Hierarchical cluster structure. To address Q3, we investigated the extent to which DiffPool learns meaningful node clusters by visualizing the cluster assignments in different layers. Figure 2 shows such a visualization of node assignments in the first and second layers on a graph from Collab data set, where node color indicates its cluster membership. Node cluster membership is determined by taking the argmaxargmax\operatorname*{argmax} of its cluster assignment probabilities. We observe that even when learning cluster assignment based solely on the graph classification objective, DiffPool can still capture the hierarchical community structure. We also observe significant improvement in membership assignment quality with link prediction auxiliary objectives.
items.zh: 层次聚类结构。为了解决 Q3，我们通过可视化不同层中的聚类分配，研究了 DiffPool 学习有意义的节点聚类的程度。图 2 显示了 Collab 数据集中一个图的第一层和第二层节点分配的可视化，其中节点颜色表示其聚类成员关系。节点聚类成员关系通过取聚类分配概率的 argmax 确定。我们观察到，即使仅基于图分类目标学习聚类分配，DiffPool 仍然可以捕获层次社区结构。我们还观察到，使用链接预测辅助目标，成员分配质量有显著提高。

items.en: Dense vs. sparse subgraph structure. In addition, we observe that DiffPool learns to collapse nodes into soft clusters in a non-uniform way, with a tendency to collapse densely-connected subgraphs into clusters. Since GNNs can efficiently perform message-passing on dense, clique-like subgraphs (due to their small diameters) [27], pooling together nodes in such a dense subgraph is not likely to lead to any loss of structural information. This intuitively explains why collapsing dense subgraphs is a useful pooling strategy for DiffPool. In contrast, sparse subgraphs may contain many interesting structures, including path-, cycle- and tree-like structures, and given the high-diameter induced by sparsity, GNN message-passing may fail to capture these structures. Thus, by separately pooling distinct parts of a sparse subgraph, DiffPool can learn to capture the meaningful structures present in sparse graph regions (e.g., as in Figure 2).
items.zh: 稠密与稀疏子图结构。此外，我们观察到 DiffPool 以非均匀方式学习将节点折叠成软聚类，倾向于将稠密连接的子图折叠成聚类。由于 GNN 可以在稠密、类似团簇的子图上高效地执行消息传递（由于其直径小）[27]，将此类稠密子图中的节点池化在一起不太可能导致任何结构信息的丢失。这直观地解释了为什么折叠稠密子图是 DiffPool 的一种有用池化策略。相比之下，稀疏子图可能包含许多有趣的结构，包括路径、环和树状结构，并且由于稀疏性导致的高直径，GNN 消息传递可能无法捕获这些结构。因此，通过分别池化稀疏子图的不同部分，DiffPool 可以学习捕获稀疏图区域中存在的有意义结构（例如，如图 2 所示）。

items.en: Assignment for nodes with similar representations. Since the assignment network computes the soft cluster assignment based on features of input nodes and their neighbors, nodes with both similar input features and neighborhood structure will have similar cluster assignment. In fact, one can construct synthetic cases where 2 nodes, although far away, have exactly the same neighborhood structure and features for self and all neighbors. In this case the pooling network is forced to assign them into the same cluster, which is different from the concept of pooling in other architectures such as image ConvNets. In some cases we do observe that disconnected nodes are pooled together.
items.zh: 具有相似表示的节点的分配。由于分配网络基于输入节点及其邻居的特征计算软聚类分配，因此具有相似输入特征和邻域结构的节点将具有相似的聚类分配。事实上，可以构造合成案例，其中两个节点尽管相距很远，但具有完全相同的邻域结构以及自身和所有邻居的特征。在这种情况下，池化网络被迫将它们分配到同一个聚类中，这与图像 ConvNet 等其他架构中的池化概念不同。在某些情况下，我们确实观察到不连通的节点被池化在一起。

items.en: In practice we rely on the identifiability assumption similar to Theorem 1 in GraphSAGE [16], where nodes are identifiable via their features. This holds in many real datasets 333However, some chemistry molecular graph datasets contain many nodes that are structurally similar, and assignment network is observed to pool together nodes that are far away.. The auxiliary link prediction objective is observed to also help discouraging nodes that are far away to be pooled together. Furthermore, it is possible to use more sophisticated GNN aggregation function such as high-order moments [38] to distinguish nodes that are similar in structure and feature space. The overall framework remains unchanged.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们依赖于类似于 GraphSAGE [16] 中定理 1 的可识别性假设，其中节点通过其特征可识别。这在许多真实数据集中成立 3。链接预测辅助目标也被观察到有助于阻止相距很远的节点被池化在一起。此外，可以使用更复杂的 GNN 聚合函数，例如高阶矩 [38]，来区分在结构和特征空间上相似的节点。整体框架保持不变。

items.en: Sensitivity of the Pre-defined Maximum Number of Clusters. We found that the assignment varies according to the depth of the network and C𝐶C, the maximum number of clusters. With larger C𝐶C, the pooling GNN can model more complex hierarchical structure. The trade-off is that very large C𝐶C results in more noise and less efficiency. Although the value of C𝐶C is a pre-defined parameter, the pooling net learns to use the appropriate number of clusters by end-to-end training. In particular, some clusters might not be used by the assignment matrix. Column corresponding to unused cluster has low values for all nodes. This is observed in Figure 2(c), where nodes are assigned predominantly into 3 clusters.
items.zh: 预定义最大聚类数的敏感性。我们发现分配根据网络深度和最大聚类数 C 而变化。C 越大，池化 GNN 可以建模更复杂的层次结构。权衡是，非常大的 C 会导致更多噪声和更低效率。尽管 C 的值是预定义参数，但池化网络通过端到端训练学习使用适当数量的聚类。特别是，某些聚类可能不被分配矩阵使用。对应于未使用聚类的列对所有节点都具有低值。这在图 2(c) 中观察到，其中节点主要被分配到 3 个聚类中。

items.en: We introduced a differentiable pooling method for GNNs that is able to extract the complex hierarchical structure of real-world graphs. By using the proposed pooling layer in conjunction with existing GNN models, we achieved new state-of-the-art results on several graph classification benchmarks. Interesting future directions include learning hard cluster assignments to further reduce computational cost in higher layers while also ensuring differentiability, and applying the hierarchical pooling method to other downstream tasks that require modeling of the entire graph structure.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种用于GNN的可微分池化方法，能够提取真实世界图数据的复杂层次结构。通过将所提出的池化层与现有GNN模型结合使用，我们在多个图分类基准上取得了新的最优结果。有趣的未来方向包括学习硬聚类分配以进一步降低高层计算成本同时确保可微性，以及将层次池化方法应用于其他需要对整个图结构进行建模的下游任务。
